name: RPlog_Setting_Things_In_Motion
title: Setting Things in Motion
summary: Using New Republic Intelligence resources, the near-Human Kintor tracks down the former Imperial Marine Sandor Woden to a Coruscant restaurant, the two having sworn after the devastating bombardment of Cochran that the Empire would pay. Wary of NRI surveillance, Kintor leads Sandor through back alleys to his ship, the Champion Glory, to plan in private. There they begin laying the groundwork for an attack on the Imperial embassy on Caspar -- whether by bombing or kidnapping a high-ranking official -- both insisting on minimizing casualties with stun settings while acknowledging they need far more recruits and meticulous planning. Kintor offers to start surveillance, forge badges, and obtain blueprints, while Sandor pledges to gather and train people he knows, and the two part with the operation set in motion despite Sandor's unease at how much could go wrong.
